title: Campaign Monitor vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
